title: Active Remcos / AgentTesla C2 tied to Aeza staging
summary: A Windows C2 server running Remcos, AgentTesla and a "Taskun" panel, fed by RFQ/quotation malspam. A UAC-bypass ChromeElevator loader staged on Aeza beacons here, linking the Aeza open-directory staging dir to an active info-stealer operation.

title: Unreported NetSupport RAT C2 chain (mheusa04)
summary: A novel, unsubmitted NetSupport Manager RAT dropper staged on Aeza infrastructure delivers a fully unreported C2 chain. Procurement/tender-themed lure; financially-motivated (BEC/fraud/access) tradecraft against corporate finance teams.

title: Nexus C2 panel hosted on BtHoster (since pulled)
summary: An instance of the emerging multi-tenant Nexus C2 framework ran on confirmed BtHoster infrastructure with 40+ communicating Windows implants during an April-May 2026 burst, then was pulled to a maintenance page after public disclosure. Notable for placing a documented C2-as-a-service framework directly on an actively-rotating bulletproof operator.

title: MeshCentral RMM-abuse C2 on Aeza-staged payloads
summary: A MeshCentral C2 reached by MeshAgent and a .NET stub payload both staged in the same Aeza open directory — RMM software repurposed as remote-access C2.
